macro.title: Wall Street rises toward records as US stocks catch up to the world's gains from the day before - AP News
macro.summary: The U.S. stock market is rising as it catches up with climbs for others around the world from the day before, when President Donald Trump said negotiations were “proceeding nicely” with Iran on ending their war. The S&P 500 added 0.4% Tuesday after trading re…
